nodes.label: DocSectionsTest.kt
DocSectionsTest
.heading()
.para()
.sampleDocument()
.`section heading ids are the top level headings in order`()
.`h1 section spans its subsections until the next h1`()
.`h2 section stops at the next heading of same or shallower level`()
.`last section extends to the end of the document`()
.`non heading and unknown ids resolve to null`()
.`nested headings are not sections`()
.`withFreshIds renews every id including nested list items and container children`()
.`withFreshIds preserves content`()
.`deleteSection removes the heading and its whole range`()
.`deleteSection is undoable`()
.`deleting the only section leaves a normalized non empty document`()
.`deleteSection rejects non section ids`()
.`duplicateSection inserts a fresh id copy right after the original`()
.`duplicateSection marks the copies dirty for persistence`()
.`moveSectionBefore moves a whole section up`()
.`moveSectionBefore with null target moves the section to the end`()
.`moveSectionBefore rejects targets inside the moving section`()
.`moveSectionBefore rejects the identity position`()
.`moving a subsection out of its parent keeps both sections intact`()
.`moveSectionBefore is undoable`()
